oracles.title: NullReferenceException in WeaponController.Fire
oracles.description: Fire() calls GetComponent<AudioSource>().Play() but the weapon GameObject has no AudioSource attached.
oracles.trigger_condition: Grab the pistol → Reload → Trigger Fire() at least once
oracles.impact: Every shot logs an exception; can crash certain Unity build configurations.
oracles.fix: var src = GetComponent<AudioSource>(); if (src != null) src.Play();

oracles.title: Target awards score without bullet collision
oracles.description: OnHit(wasRealBulletHit) does not gate on the boolean. Calling ForceTriggerHitWithoutBullet() awards score with no actual collision.

oracles.title: WaveSpawner.StopWave does not reset IsActive
oracles.description: StopWave() only zeroes the timer; IsActive remains true so StateController believes a wave is still running.
oracles.impact: Subsequent state checks see WaveStarted=true forever.

oracles.title: AmmoMagazine reload timer not reset on retry
oracles.description: _reloadTimer is not zeroed in OnInsert(); a previously-interrupted reload's accumulated time persists.
oracles.trigger_condition: OnInsert → wait < reloadDuration → OnRemove → OnInsert again
oracles.impact: Player can effectively reload instantly by pumping insert/remove.

oracles.title: Target popup uses negated angle (rotates away)
oracles.description: Activate() multiplies start rotation by Quaternion.Euler(-popupAngle, ...) so the target tilts away from the player instead of facing them.
oracles.impact: Target visually faces away — players cannot aim at it.

oracles.title: Game completes without checking required hit count
oracles.description: TryFinishGame() does not validate TargetsHit ≥ TargetsRequired or ScoreSubmitted.
oracles.trigger_condition: Trigger TryFinishGame() before hitting all targets

oracles.title: AwardPoints uses wrong precondition (IsActive vs IsHit)
oracles.description: Should gate on target.IsHit; instead checks target.IsActive.
oracles.trigger_condition: Activate target → AwardPoints called externally without OnHit
oracles.impact: Score awarded under wrong circumstances; couples to wrong state field.

oracles.title: Muzzle flash stays active after visibility window
oracles.description: Update() detects timer expiry but does NOT call SetActive(false) on flashQuad.
oracles.impact: Persistent muzzle flash blocks player view.

oracles.title: Reload increments chamber before validating magazine
oracles.description: Reload() sets ChamberRounds = 6 BEFORE checking magazine.IsLoaded; reloads succeed even with empty mag.
oracles.trigger_condition: Reload() with magazine null or magazine.IsLoaded=false
oracles.fix: Validate magazine FIRST, then assign ChamberRounds.

oracles.title: ResetAllState does not cascade to combo / wave / flash
oracles.description: Resets only state-controller fields; downstream singletons retain stale data.
oracles.trigger_condition: Award some combo → ResetAllState() → check ScoreManager.ComboStreak
oracles.impact: New game inherits old combo / wave / visual state.
